en: "Bezalel and Oholiab and every craftsman in whom the LORD has put skill and intelligence to know how to do any work in the construction of the sanctuary shall work in accordance with all that the LORD has commanded."
zh: 比撒列和亞何利亞伯，以及心裡有智慧的，就是蒙耶和華賜予智慧與聰明，使他們知道怎樣製造供聖所使用的一切工程的人，都照著耶和華吩咐的一切去作。

en: And Moses called Bezalel and Oholiab and every craftsman in whose mind the LORD had put skill, everyone whose heart stirred him up to come to do the work.
zh: 於是，摩西把比撒列和亞何利亞伯，以及心裡有智慧的，就是蒙耶和華賜他們心裡有智慧的人，凡是心裡受感要前來作這工的人，都召了來。

en: And they received from Moses all the contribution that the people of Israel had brought for doing the work on the sanctuary. They still kept bringing him freewill offerings every morning,
zh: 他們當著摩西面前，接收了以色列人為供聖所使用的工程帶來的一切禮物。他們天天早晨還把自願奉獻的禮物帶到摩西那裡來。

en: so that all the craftsmen who were doing every sort of task on the sanctuary came, each from the task that he was doing,
zh: 凡是作聖所一切工的智慧人，各人都放下自己所作的工，來了。

en: and said to Moses, "The people bring much more than enough for doing the work that the LORD has commanded us to do."
zh: 他們告訴摩西：“人民帶來的太多，超過耶和華吩咐所作工程使用的需要。”

en: So Moses gave command, and word was proclaimed throughout the camp, "Let no man or woman do anything more for the contribution for the sanctuary." So the people were restrained from bringing,
zh: 於是摩西下令，他們就在營中宣告，說：“無論男女都不必再為聖所的工程奉獻甚麼禮物。”這樣，人民才被攔阻，不送甚麼禮物來。

en: for the material they had was sufficient to do all the work, and more.
zh: 因為所有的材料夠作一切工程，而且有餘。

en: And all the craftsmen among the workmen made the tabernacle with ten curtains. They were made of fine twined linen and blue and purple and scarlet yarns, with cherubim skillfully worked.
zh: 在作這工程的人中，凡是心裡有智慧的，用十幅幔子作帳幕；這些幔子是用撚的細麻、藍色紫色朱紅色線做的，並且用設計的巧工繡上基路伯。

en: The length of each curtain was twenty-eight cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits. All the curtains were the same size.
zh: 每一幅幔子長十二公尺，每一幅幔子寬兩公尺，所有的幔子都是一樣的尺寸。

en: He coupled five curtains to one another, and the other five curtains he coupled to one another.
zh: 他把五幅幔子一一相連；也使另外五幅幔子一一相連。

en: He made loops of blue on the edge of the outermost curtain of the first set. Likewise he made them on the edge of the outermost curtain of the second set.
zh: 在第一組相連的幔子末幅的邊緣上，他做藍色的鈕扣；在另一組相連的幔子末幅的邊緣上，他也照樣作。

en: He made fifty loops on the one curtain, and he made fifty loops on the edge of the curtain that was in the second set. The loops were opposite one another.
zh: 在這一幅幔子上，他做了五十個鈕扣；在第二幅相連的幔子的邊緣上，他也做了五十個鈕扣，這些鈕扣都彼此相對。

en: And he made fifty clasps of gold, and coupled the curtains one to the other with clasps. So the tabernacle was a single whole.
zh: 又做了五十個金鉤，用鉤子使幔子彼此相連。這樣就成了一個帳幕。

en: He also made curtains of goats' hair for a tent over the tabernacle. He made eleven curtains.
zh: 他又用山羊毛做了幔子，作為帳幕上的罩棚，共做了十一幅幔子。

en: The length of each curtain was thirty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits. The eleven curtains were the same size.
zh: 每一幅幔子長十三公尺，寬兩公尺，十一幅幔子都是一樣的尺寸。

en: He coupled five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves.
zh: 他把五幅幔子相連在一起，又把另外六幅幔子相連在一起。

en: And he made fifty loops on the edge of the outermost curtain of the one set, and fifty loops on the edge of the other connecting curtain.
zh: 在第一組相連的幔子末幅的邊緣上，做了五十個鈕扣；在第二組相連的幔子末幅的邊緣上，也做了五十個鈕扣。

en: And he made fifty clasps of bronze to couple the tent together that it might be a single whole.
zh: 又做了五十個銅鉤，使罩棚相連，可以成為一個。

en: And he made for the tent a covering of tanned rams' skins and goatskins.
zh: 用染紅的公羊皮做了罩棚的蓋，又用海狗皮做蓋，放在罩棚的蓋上面。

en: Then he made the upright frames for the tabernacle of acacia wood.
zh: 他替帳幕用皂莢木做了豎板。

en: Ten cubits was the length of a frame, and a cubit and a half the breadth of each frame.
zh: 每塊板長四公尺，寬六十六公分。

en: Each frame had two tenons for fitting together. He did this for all the frames of the tabernacle.
zh: 每塊板有兩個榫頭，彼此相連接；帳幕一切木板，他都這樣做。

en: The frames for the tabernacle he made thus: twenty frames for the south side.
zh: 他為帳幕做板，給南邊，就是向南的方向做了二十塊板。

en: And he made forty bases of silver under the twenty frames, two bases under one frame for its two tenons, and two bases under the next frame for its two tenons.
zh: 在這二十塊板底下，做了四十個銀座；這塊板底下的兩個銀座用來連接板的兩個榫頭，那塊板底下的兩個銀座用來連接它的兩個榫頭。

en: For the second side of the tabernacle, on the north side, he made twenty frames
zh: 他為帳幕的第二邊，就是北面，也做了二十塊板，

en: and their forty bases of silver, two bases under one frame and two bases under the next frame.
zh: 和四十個銀座；這一塊板底下有兩個銀座，那一塊板底下也有兩個銀座。

en: For the rear of the tabernacle westward he made six frames.
zh: 帳幕的後面，就是西面，做了六塊板。

en: He made two frames for corners of the tabernacle in the rear.
zh: 他替帳幕後面兩個角上做了兩塊板。

en: And they were separate beneath but joined at the top, at the first ring. He made two of them this way for the two corners.
zh: 板的下截是雙的，直到上面的第一個環才接合完整；他把兩塊板都這樣做了，形成兩個角。

en: There were eight frames with their bases of silver: sixteen bases, under every frame two bases.
zh: 所以共有八塊板，十六個銀座。每一塊板底下都有兩個銀座。

en: He made bars of acacia wood, five for the frames of the one side of the tabernacle,
zh: 他又用皂莢木做了橫閂，替帳幕這一邊的板做了五個橫閂，

en: and five bars for the frames of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the frames of the tabernacle at the rear westward.
zh: 替帳幕第二邊的板也做了五個橫閂，替帳幕後面，就是西面的板也做了五個橫閂，

en: And he made the middle bar to run from end to end halfway up the frames.
zh: 他又做了中間的橫閂，穿過板腰，從這一端穿到那一端。

en: And he overlaid the frames with gold, and made their rings of gold for holders for the bars, and overlaid the bars with gold.
zh: 他用金子把板包裹，也做了板上的金環，用作穿橫閂的地方，並且也用金子把橫閂包裹。

en: He made the veil of blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen; with cherubim skillfully worked into it he made it.
zh: 他用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做了一幅幔幕，用巧設的圖案手工繡上基路伯。

en: And for it he made four pillars of acacia and overlaid them with gold. Their hooks were of gold, and he cast for them four bases of silver.
zh: 他替幔幕做了四根皂莢木柱子，用金子包裹，柱釘是金的，又替柱子鑄造四個銀座。

en: He also made a screen for the entrance of the tent, of blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen, embroidered with needlework,
zh: 又用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻，用繡花的手工做成帳幕的門簾；

en: and its five pillars with their hooks. He overlaid their capitals, and their fillets were of gold, but their five bases were of bronze.
zh: 又為門簾做了五根柱子和柱子上的釘子，用金子把柱頂和橫杆包裹。但那五個座是銅的。
